samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven.compiler.release to 21 to target Java 21 bytecode.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project compiles for Java 8, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities with libraries requiring Java 21.
Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 in many contexts and lacks support for modern Java features.
Spring Boot 3.x and modern Java ecosystems have deprecated/removed support for JUnit 4; tests will fail to compile or run without JUnit 5.
Spring Boot 3.x migrated from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation; code using @PostConstruct or @PreDestroy will fail to compile without this dependency.
Older versions of Groovy compiler plugins may not support Java 21 syntax or bytecode generation.
